summary: TWO_ROW: top NumberLine 0..30 with YELLOW observer Dot at 0 and BLUE triangular-lighthouse markers popping up at 1, 2, ..., N via always_redraw as ValueTracker N_tr grows 1→30. Bottom Axes plot of S_N = Σ_{k=1..N} 1/k² drawn via always_redraw VMobject set_points_as_corners, with a YELLOW DashedLine at π²/6 ≈ 1.6449 and a RED rider Dot. Top-right readout shows Integer N, DecimalNumber S_N, and the gap π²/6 − S_N.
